title: Grid-scale battery adoption trends

papers.title: Lithium-ion degradation in utility-scale installations
papers.summary: Field study of 14 utility sites showing capacity fade correlated with daily cycling depth.

papers.title: Hybrid solar + storage dispatch models
papers.summary: Compares rule-based and ML dispatch policies for co-located PV and battery assets.

keyFindings: Shallow cycling extends battery life by 18–24% in the sampled fleet.
Hybrid dispatch models reduce curtailment by 11% versus solar-only baselines.
